allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($node\){ node --check "js\\app.js"; if\($?\){ "JS OK" } } else { "node not found" })

PowerShell($p = Test-Path ".\\node_modules\\playwright"; $g = \(npm ls -g --depth=0 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "playwright|puppeteer"\); "local playwright: $p"; "global: $g"; \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | ForEach-Object { "npx available" })
